# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 1000
              policy: local
    upstreams:
      - name: user-service-upstream
        hosts:
          - host: user-service
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round-robin
        retries: 5
        timeout: 10
        slots: 1000
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          max_age: 3600

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 1000
              policy: local
    upstreams:
      - name: product-service-upstream
        hosts:
          - host: product-service
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round-robin
        retries: 5
        timeout: 10
        slots: 1000
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          max_age: 3600

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 1000
              policy: local
    upstreams:
      - name: order-service-upstream
        hosts:
          - host: order-service
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round-robin
        retries: 5
        timeout: 10
        slots: 1000
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          max_age: 3600

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_names:
        - apikey
      hide_credentials: true
      anonymous: ""
      run_on_preflight: true
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      sync_rate: 0
      window_size:
        - 60
      window_type: sliding
      limit_by: consumer
      redis:
        host: redis
        port: 6379
        database: 0
        password: ""
        timeout: 2000
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - Access-Control-Request-Method
        - Access-Control-Request-Headers
      exposed_headers:
        - "*"
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: false
      preflight_continue: false
